name: MacKenzie Realty Capital, Inc.
summary: PART I Organization MacKenzie Realty Capital, Inc. (the Parent Company together with its subsidiaries as discussed below, collectively, the Company, we, us, or our) was incorporated under the general corporation laws of the State of Maryland on January 27, 2012. We have elected to be treated as a real estate investment trust (REIT) as defined under Subchapter M of the Internal Revenue Code of 1986, as amended (the Code).
